scope: Target, train-test contamination, temporal, between-group leakage.
key_concepts: Data leakage gives a model an artificially high accuracy during training that fails drastically in production.
Target leakage: When a feature is a proxy for the target or contains information functionally generated after the target.
Train-test contamination: When parameter calculations (like global mean) compute over the test set before the split.
Temporal leakage: Utilizing future data points to predict past data points.
Between-group leakage: Splitting data strictly randomly when observation units exist in correlated groups, exposing the model to the group identity rather than predictive features.

definitions.definition: Kondisi saat informasi pengujian atau target tak sengaja masuk ke dalam proses pelatihan.
Penggunaan atribut fitur yang baru diketahui bersamaan atau setelah target terjadi.
Kondisi saat fase pelatihan menyerap informasi pola agregat dari himpunan distribusi uji.

examples: Target leakage: Predicting customer churn by using an 'account closed date' feature.
Train-test contamination: Filling missing values with the mean of the entire dataset before splitting it into train/test.
exclusions: Do not provide specific python code.
